adrs.title: Tighten H-17 wall budget via FULL_ONLY_CHECKS partition
Generator substrate — write_generated helper + generated/ schema gate (H.2.0)
Frontend generators (H.2.1) — api_endpoints, ui_primitives, routes, test_coverage_targets
Introduce H-21 harness_policy_schema check (JSON Schema validation)
Backend generators (H.2.2) — backend_routes, db_models, storage_gateway_methods, test_coverage_required_paths, test_inventory
Cross-stack generators (H.2.3) — validation_inventory, dependency_inventory, performance_budgets, security_inventory
H.2.4 + H.2.5 generators (a11y, docs, logging, errors, outbound_http, conventions)
Introduce Q15 documentation_policy check (docstrings + JSDoc + ADR triggers)
Introduce Q16 logging_policy check (no print, no silent except, lazy format, no secret literals)
Introduce Q17 error_handling_policy check (no silent swallow, preserve chain, narrow types, detail HTTP)
Introduce Q19 typecheck_policy check (mypy + tsc baseline diff)
